action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5777, local test 90% success. 3 iterations left. Analysis: Need to maximize score in remaining iterations. The current planner achieves 87.3% success in eval with ~356m average distance. Score = S_i*(300/d_i). If I can get 95% success with 320m distance, score would be ~0.89. Key improvement: use nearest-frontier navigation to minimize travel distance, and improve stuck recovery. Decision: Write improved planner with nearest-frontier strategy and submit eval.
